title: viola hirsutula
intro: Viola hirsutula, also known as the hairy violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The hairy violet is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and improving sleep quality, as well as possessing antioxidant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
